'''Echnos''', also known as '''Tinn VI-D''', was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Tinn VI]] with a [[Nitrogen/Legends|nitrogen]]-rich atmosphere. Its sole settlement was an immense domed structure called [[Echnos City]] which arose as a way station for numerous [[Starship/Legends|ships]] that lost their [[magnetic bottle]] shielding from passing too close to Tinn VI's powerful negative [[Magnetic field/Legends|magnetic field]]. Echnos City was the headquarters of the [[Mandellian Corporation]], which hosted a demolition derby called the [[BlastBoast 2000]] located at the bottom of the city inside [[Echnos Exhibition Dome]].

{{Moon-stub}}
